query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_order.consumer_orders (
                id, tenant_id, cart_id, user_id, session_id,
                status, fulfillment_method, payment_method,
                shipping_name, shipping_address,
                shipping_phone, subtotal_nanodollar,
                shipping_fee_nanodollar, total_nanodollar,
                stripe_checkout_session_id, pickup_deadline
            ) VALUES (
                ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,
                ?, ?, ?,
                ?, ?,
                ?, ?,
                ?, ?,
                ?, ?
            )
